task_completion.description: Navigate to the catalog or products section in Ekylibre
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekylibre web interface is visible, specifically showing the catalog, products, or product variants section.

task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new product variant
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form for creating a new product or product variant is open in the Ekylibre interface.
The text 'Ammonitrate 33.5' is entered into the name input field of the product variant creation form.

task_completion.description: Assign a suitable nature to the variant
task_completion.visual_evidence: The nature field in the form shows a selection such as 'Engrais minéral' or 'Matière'.
The unit field in the form shows 'Kilogram' or 'kg' as the selected option.

task_completion.description: Save and verify the creation of the product variant
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification is visible, or 'Ammonitrate 33.5' appears in the list of registered product variants in the catalog.

integrity.description: Agent used the Ekylibre web interface to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the Ekylibre application in a web browser, rather than executing terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database commands
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using a database client or terminal to directly insert records into the 'product_nature_variants' PostgreSQL table.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with genuine application forms
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen interacting with the actual Ekylibre web forms (clicking dropdowns, typing in fields) rather than typing the answers into a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected product variant name is 'Ammonitrate 33.5', which is a real nitrogen fertilizer product. The target database table for this entity in Ekylibre is 'product_nature_variants', but the agent must use the web interface to create it.
